titleStmt.title: SII 39.72: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 72. (A.R. No. 72 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBHUVANṈCHAKRAVARTIN KŌṈĒRIṈMAIKOṆḌĀṈ.

summary.p: This fragmentary inscription seems to register the order of the king. The tax iḍaiyarvari is mentioned. Signatories like Paḻandīparāyaṉ, Araiyar Tirunelvēliyuḍaiyaṉ alias Toṇḍaimāṉ, Arasu-Pallavaraiyaṉ etc., are mentioned in the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śrītiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti
koṉerimaiy koṇṭāṉ puṟama
lai nāṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭai
yār śivadharmmiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār
tirukkoyilil tāṉattāṟku Aka
ḷaṅkanāṭāḻvār tampi cemāṇṭār
Ikkoyilil Eḻuntaruḷivitta kūttā
ṭuvāṟkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷuṭṭu
veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukkup pūṅkuṉṟa
nāṭṭu nāṭṭār pakkal nakularācaṉ vi
lai koṇṭu vilaiyolaippaṭi Iṉnāṭṭu mañcane
ri ṉ pakkal cemāṇṭār Ikkoyili
l caṇṭeśvaratevar perāṟ tirunāmattukkāṇi
pūṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭu mañcaṉeri nāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa
nirnilamum karuñcey puṉceyum nattamum toṭṭamum kuḷamum kuḷa
pparippum Uṭpaṭa nilamu muṉṉuṭaiyārum Uḻavuntavuttuk kārā
ṇmai miyāṭciyum kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum taru
vatāṉa Accum kāriyavārāṭciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili
yum cantuvikkirakappeṟum vācalpeṟum Ilāñcaṉaippeṟum
taṟiyiṟaiyum cekkiṟaiyum taṭṭaḷippāṭṭamum Iṭaiyarvari Iṉava
riyum ciṟṟāyamum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa pa
tiṉoṉṟāvatu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu
kāliṅkarāyar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ittirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭai
yār śivadharmmiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyilil Akaḷaṅkanāṭāḻvā
r tampi cemāṇṭar Eḻuntaruḷivitta kūttāṭuvāṟkut tiruppaṭi
māṟṟuḷḷuṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukkup pūṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭu nāṭṭā
r pakkal nakularācaṉ vilai koṇṭuṭaiya vilaiyolaippaṭi nakularā
caṉ pakkal cemāṇṭar Ikkoyilil caṇṭeśvaratevar perāl
ttirunāmattukkāṇiyāka caṇṭeśvarapperuvilaiyāka koṇṭa vilai
yolaippaṭi pūṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭu mañcaṉeri nāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭ
ṭa nirnilamum karuñcey puṉceyum nattamum toṭṭamum kuḷamum
kuḷapparippum Uṭpaṭṭa nilamum muṉṉuṭaiyāru Uḻavuntavut
tuk kārāṇmai miyāṭciyum kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyo
kamum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārāṭciyum ṭipāṭṭamu
Digital edition of SII 39.72 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
